verified: Pinned Lemonade image ghcr.io/lemonade-sdk/lemonade-server:v9.1.3 builds under Podman-backed Compose.
Compose healthcheck targets /api/v1/models for this image version using curl, which is available inside the pinned image.
Compose configuration contains no CUDA, ROCm, Vulkan, NPU, GPU device, or accelerator configuration.

pipeline_continuation.note: Candidate model downloads are intentionally separated from service startup because each model pull can take longer than the runtime health gate.
